bead.title: refactor(svelte): migrate to houdini@next or commit to STACK.md Option A/B before Stage 4.12
bead.description:
Opus Stage 3 batch review (2026-04-15): Houdini 1.5.10 has unresolved peer-dep incompatibility with vite 8 + kit 2.57. STACK.md recommended Option A (downgrade vite) or Option B (drop Houdini for graphql-request). Stage 3.4 shipped with neither — works for now because the single NodeInfo query is trivial.

Stage 4.12 Workers page requires graphql-ws subscriptions (workerProgress). Houdini 1.5.10 subscription support on Vite 8 is the most likely place the peer-dep workaround falls apart.

Decision required BEFORE Stage 4.12: either (a) migrate to houdini@next (removes the 'upgrade to houdini@next' noise and fixes Vite 8 support), or (b) drop Houdini entirely for graphql-request + graphql-ws (lower abstraction, no codegen).
bead.acceptance: (1) Decision recorded in STACK.md. (2) Either houdini@next installed and regen passes, or graphql-request + graphql-ws wired up with equivalent code paths. (3) bun run build succeeds without peer-dep warnings. (4) Stage 4.12 workerProgress subscription round-trips in a smoke test.
